channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: With the buzz of the final in the air, we celebrate the beau…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: With the buzz of the final in the air, we celebrate the beautiful game with music from countries that have won the World Cup in recent years. Look for Tiny Desk Radio on your local NPR station. n.pr/4w6rrLz
item.content:encoded: With the buzz of the final in the air, we celebrate the beautiful game with music from countries that have won the World Cup in recent years. Look for Tiny Desk Radio on your local NPR station. n.pr/4w6rrLz

item.title: 💗ピンク・レディー💗 💿トリビュートアルバム収録曲を公開💿 森高千里、渡瀬マキ、百田夏菜子、 イエモン…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
💗ピンク・レディー💗
💿トリビュートアルバム収録曲を公開💿

森高千里、渡瀬マキ、百田夏菜子、
イエモン吉井和哉、AKB48伊藤百花、
小泉今日子ら11組が名曲をカバー（コメントあり）
https://natalie.mu/music/news/681068?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

#ピンクレディー
item.content:encoded:
💗ピンク・レディー💗
💿トリビュートアルバム収録曲を公開💿

森高千里、渡瀬マキ、百田夏菜子、
イエモン吉井和哉、AKB48伊藤百花、
小泉今日子ら11組が名曲をカバー（コメントあり）
https://natalie.mu/music/news/681068?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

#ピンクレディー

item.title: Gracie Abrams' 'Daughter From Hell' is her best album yet, w…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Gracie Abrams' 'Daughter From Hell' is her best album yet, with songs that sparkle with angst, beauty, and all the baggage that comes with adulthood.

Review ↓
item.content:encoded:
Gracie Abrams' 'Daughter From Hell' is her best album yet, with songs that sparkle with angst, beauty, and all the baggage that comes with adulthood.

Review ↓

item.title: Your weekly metal rabbit hole starts here. These albums are…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description:
Your weekly metal rabbit hole starts here.

These albums are trending on Bandcamp Discover. Explore more metal: https://bit.ly/4pcajkG

• Bring Me The Horizon – Count Your Blessings | Repented
• KEYGEN CHURCH – Oscuro Domine
• Noctule – Extinguish Thy Flame
• Warlock Corpse – Under The Cold Moon
item.content:encoded:
Your weekly metal rabbit hole starts here.

These albums are trending on Bandcamp Discover. Explore more metal: https://bit.ly/4pcajkG

• Bring Me The Horizon – Count Your Blessings | Repented
• KEYGEN CHURCH – Oscuro Domine
• Noctule – Extinguish Thy Flame
• Warlock Corpse – Under The Cold Moon

item.title: Argentina survived another heart-stopping match when it scor…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Argentina survived another heart-stopping match when it scored two late goals to topple England and extend the Three Lions' six-decade-long wait for another World Cup trophy. n.pr/4w0L87i
item.content:encoded: Argentina survived another heart-stopping match when it scored two late goals to topple England and extend the Three Lions' six-decade-long wait for another World Cup trophy. n.pr/4w0L87i

item.title: New & Notable: The new EP from Ma Sha is a ball of breathles…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: New & Notable: The new EP from Ma Sha is a ball of breathless energy - 900 mph dance music with beats that quicken the pulse.
item.content:encoded: New & Notable: The new EP from Ma Sha is a ball of breathless energy - 900 mph dance music with beats that quicken the pulse.

item.title: Donald Trump has plunged the United States into exactly the …
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Donald Trump has plunged the United States into exactly the kind of “forever war” he campaigned against — and you’re paying for it.

Commentary ↓
item.content:encoded:
Donald Trump has plunged the United States into exactly the kind of “forever war” he campaigned against — and you’re paying for it.

Commentary ↓

item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The change is driven by improved perceptions of China and declining views of the United States. n.pr/4prDLDx

item.title: @warnock.senate.gov on “intellectually dishonest” redistrict…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
@warnock.senate.gov on “intellectually dishonest” redistricting efforts in the South:

“The Supreme Court, the Roberts Court, has done a lot of damage, in my view, to our democracy.”

More: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded:
@warnock.senate.gov on “intellectually dishonest” redistricting efforts in the South:

“The Supreme Court, the Roberts Court, has done a lot of damage, in my view, to our democracy.”

More: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...

item.title: One of the most interesting rappers alive dives deeper and w…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
One of the most interesting rappers alive dives deeper and works up an idiosyncratic mix that will please longtime fans — but the results aren’t as satisfying as you’d hope.

Review ↓
item.content:encoded:
One of the most interesting rappers alive dives deeper and works up an idiosyncratic mix that will please longtime fans — but the results aren’t as satisfying as you’d hope.

Review ↓

item.title: @warnock.senate.gov thinks Americans are reexamining how pol…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
@warnock.senate.gov thinks Americans are reexamining how politicians weaponize faith:

“I don’t think that people are necessarily impressed or unimpressed by your creeds. I think what matters is your deeds.”

Interview: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded:
@warnock.senate.gov thinks Americans are reexamining how politicians weaponize faith:

“I don’t think that people are necessarily impressed or unimpressed by your creeds. I think what matters is your deeds.”

Interview: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...

item.title: The New York Times journalist Jonathan Swan says the preside…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The New York Times journalist Jonathan Swan says the president is fixated on becoming a "great man of history" during his second term. Swan's new book, written with Maggie Haberman, is Regime Change. n.pr/3Ti7ItB
item.content:encoded: The New York Times journalist Jonathan Swan says the president is fixated on becoming a "great man of history" during his second term. Swan's new book, written with Maggie Haberman, is Regime Change. n.pr/3Ti7ItB

item.title: Album of the Day: Brian Ennals & Blockhead, "Boatshoes." An …
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Album of the Day: Brian Ennals & Blockhead, "Boatshoes." An effortless collaborative album from two wizened souls who've learned not to take themselves too seriously.
item.content:encoded: Album of the Day: Brian Ennals & Blockhead, "Boatshoes." An effortless collaborative album from two wizened souls who've learned not to take themselves too seriously.
